title: integration manifest cross-stream contract
purpose: C4.3 defines integration manifest cross stream contract for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery.
scope: Owns `C4.3` only; siblings under `C4` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §5 — Branch C — Product execution plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#5-branch-c-product-execution-plane).
behavior_steps: When program-scoper decomposes a mega-spec, integration-manifest-keeper drafts `docs/program/integration/manifest.md` with API surfaces, shared schemas, test harness boundaries, and per-stream completion criteria—the cross-stream contract before parallel lanes execute.

Parallel implement via [C4.2](C4.2-orchestrate-program.md) and [C4.1](C4.1-workstreams-lane-json-leases.md) stays BLOCKED at [A2.1](A2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) until manifest approval clears H1 (or pack self-gate with verify suite when pack policy allows).
Each lane worker receives only its manifest slice through Librarian `allowed_reads`; lane scope must not drift beyond declared integration boundaries in the contract.
Manifest edits mark artifact graph nodes stale via reconcile-artifact-graph; dependent lanes pause at preflight until reconcile-stale completes and journal records reconciliation.

If manifest gaps leave stream boundaries ambiguous or lanes implement against an unapproved contract, program goal_verify fails closed at H2 until manifest-keeper updates the contract and operators re-approve.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `C4.3` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `C4.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `C4.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `C4.3` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_c4_3.py when script exists.
Validate `C4.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `C4.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `C4.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: C4.3 defines integration manifest cross stream contract for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery. In practice, the system when program-scoper decomposes a mega-spec, integration-manifest-keeper drafts `docs/program/integration/manifest.md` with api surfaces, shared schemas, test harness boundaries, and per-stream completion criteria—the cross-stream contract before parallel lanes execute, then parallel implement via [c4.2](c4.2-orchestrate-program.md) and [c4.1](c4.1-workstreams-lane-json-leases.md) stays blocked at [a2.1](a2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) until manifest approval clears h1 (or pack self-gate with verify suite when pack policy allows).
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-c 2026-06-28 -->

Integration manifest is the cross-stream contract: API surfaces, shared schemas, test harness boundaries, and completion criteria per stream. Human gate before parallel implement unless pack policy self-gates with verify suite.

Manifest changes mark artifact graph nodes stale; dependent lanes pause at preflight until reconcile completes. This document is the program-level analog of feature design approval.
